findings.title: Lack of modern IaC and GitOps paradigms

evidence.heading: # Configuration Management
evidence.excerpt: This post focuses on its modern application and use in agile CI/CD software environments.

findings.recommendation: Expand the content to explicitly cover declarative configuration management, Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools (Terraform, Pulumi), GitOps workflows, and cloud-native configuration patterns (e.g., Kustomize, Helm, Crossplane) to align with current industry standards.
